title: Debug why task sweeper shows stale tasks

log.context: Debug why task sweeper shows stale tasks

Now I have everything I need. Here's the full picture:

---

## Root Cause

The sweeper (`sweeper_act.py`) has a **logic inversion** compared to the startup check in CLAUDE.md.

**Sweeper (`_derive_status`) prioritizes the log over the top-level `status` field:**
```python
if log and isinstance(log, list) and len(log) > 0:
    last_event = log[-1].get("event", "")
    if last_event == "started":
        return "in_progress"
    ...
# Backward compat: old format with top-level status field
return...(truncated)
